title: stachys circinata
intro: Stachys circinata, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Stachys circinata include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Stachys circinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
